scored.actual_question: How are you thinking about rolling in new fuel hedges in this high fuel environment? And at what level of capacity growth would NCC ex-fuel inflation rise to ~2–3%?
scored.reasoning: The predicted question concerns capital structure and unsecured bond issuance for newbuild financing, which is unrelated to fuel hedging or unit-cost (NCC ex‑fuel) sensitivity to capacity growth; no predicted item addresses these cost/hedging concerns.
